supporting_evidence:
Hey Buddy! I'm really excited about learning AI, but I'm also confused about some concepts. 
I work as a Python developer in Brisbane and I believe AI will revolutionize programming. 
Can you help me understand how consciousness works in AI systems? 
I heard there are different approaches. Also, I'm worried about AI safety.
